title: rubus rotundellus
intro: Rubus rotundellus, also known as the Round-leaved Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Western Europe and parts of North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus rotundellus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
